title: Savory Crunchy Thai Nuts Stir-fry
description: A high-protein-friendly salty and crunchy post-workout dish featuring dried red chillies, pressure-cooked for an easy-to-make meal.
instructions: Preheat your pressure cooker or a regular stovetop wok over medium-high heat.
Add coconut oil to the hot pan, swirl it around to coat the bottom evenly.
Crush dried red chillies into small pieces using mortar and pestle or by crushing with a rolling pin.
Sprinkle salt on top of the oil for flavor enhancement. Add minced green onions and crushed red chillies to the heated pan.
Add peanuts, stir-fry for about 2 minutes until they start to pop and take up color from the spices.
If using rice noodles, add them in the final minute while stir-frying; ensure not to overcook as they will absorb too much moisture.
Serve hot with soya sauce or any preferred dipping sauces. Garnish with fresh green onions if desired.
